# tag: sleep

## #74414
- added: 2026-02-23 06:28:13

TAKE L-THEANINE 30 TO 45 MINUTES BEFORE BED\nIT PEAKS RIGHT WHEN YOUR BRAIN STARTS TRANSITIONING INTO SLEEP\n\nAVOID CAFFEINE FOR AT LEAST SIX HOURS BEFOREHAND\nBECAUSE CAFFEINE RAISES BETA\n\nTAKE L-THEANINE ON A MOSTLY EMPTY STOMACH\nYOUR BODY CAN MAKE FULL USE OF IT\n\nPAIR IT WITH MAGNESIUM OR THE AMINO ACID GLYCINE\nSTRENGTHEN THE CALMING EFFECT WITH NO SEDATION
